languages.original_text: "Wrong. But if you insist..." {n}The xenos raises his weapon.{/n} "Let us continue."

languages.text: «Te equivocas. Pero, si insistes...». {n}El xenos alza su arma.{/n} «Continuemos».
languages.original_text: "Wrong. But if you insist..." {n}The xenos raises his weapon.{/n} "Let us continue."

traits.locale_text: «Te equivocas. Pero, si insistes...». {n}El xenos alza su arma.{/n} «Continuemos».

languages.text: “你错了。不过你要是坚持的话……”{n}异形举起他的武器。{/n}“那就继续吧。”
languages.original_text: "Wrong. But if you insist..." {n}The xenos raises his weapon.{/n} "Let us continue."

traits.locale_text: “你错了。不过你要是坚持的话……”{n}异形举起他的武器。{/n}“那就继续吧。”

languages.text: « Vous vous trompez, mais si vous insistez... continuons, » {n}déclare le xénos en brandissant son arme.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Wrong. But if you insist..." {n}The xenos raises his weapon.{/n} "Let us continue."

traits.locale_text: « Vous vous trompez, mais si vous insistez... continuons, » {n}déclare le xénos en brandissant son arme.{/n}

languages.text: "Yanlış. Fakat madem ısrar ediyorsun..." {n}Zeno silahını kaldırıyor.{/n} "Devam edelim."
languages.original_text: "Wrong. But if you insist..." {n}The xenos raises his weapon.{/n} "Let us continue."

traits.locale_text: "Yanlış. Fakat madem ısrar ediyorsun..." {n}Zeno silahını kaldırıyor.{/n} "Devam edelim."

languages.text: "Falsch. Aber wenn du darauf bestehst ..." {n}Der Xenos hebt seine Waffe.{/n} "Lass uns fortfahren."
languages.original_text: "Wrong. But if you insist..." {n}The xenos raises his weapon.{/n} "Let us continue."

traits.locale_text: "Falsch. Aber wenn du darauf bestehst ..." {n}Der Xenos hebt seine Waffe.{/n} "Lass uns fortfahren."

languages.text: 「間違っている。でも、君がどうしてもと言うなら…」{n}異形は武器を構える。{/n}「続きましょう。」
languages.original_text: "Wrong. But if you insist..." {n}The xenos raises his weapon.{/n} "Let us continue."

traits.locale_text: 「間違っている。でも、君がどうしてもと言うなら…」{n}異形は武器を構える。{/n}「続きましょう。」
